strengths: Direct hands-on experience with the exact required stack — TypeScript, React, Node.js, and relational/SQL databases — across multiple senior roles at Optilyz, RIDE Capital, and re:cinq
Demonstrated commitment to clean software architecture through TDD, pairing, trunk-based development, and authored testing libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial)
Active AI/LLM infrastructure work at re:cinq (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) directly matches the nice-to-have LLM integration qualifications
concerns: Seniority mismatch — candidate is a Staff/Senior engineer applying for an entry-level role, which may raise questions about long-term fit
Listed location is Lagos, Nigeria while the role requires high on-site presence (likely Germany based on the platform context)
Basic German listed, which may matter for an on-site role at a German energy-consulting platform
response.justification: The candidate brings precisely the required fullstack toolkit — TypeScript, React, Node.js, and SQL databases — proven across multiple production platforms including a Direct Mail automation system handling millions of mails and an investment platform at RIDE Capital. Their demonstrated craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, authored testing frameworks) aligns directly with the role's emphasis on clean software architecture, while current LLM and MCP work at re:cinq covers the nice-to-have AI integration qualifications. Founding GISCollective — a Kubernetes-deployable geo-data platform serving NGOs — further shows the pragmatic, end-to-end product thinking this renewable-energy platform needs.
